basic.question_text: 查询所有员工中**最长的工龄**是多少年。
hints: MAX(years_employed) 返回最大值
SELECT MAX(years_employed) FROM employees;
SELECT MAX(years_employed) FROM employees;

basic.question_text: 查询**每个角色（role）的平均工龄**。
basic.question_context: SELECT role, AVG(years_employed) ... GROUP BY role。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT role, AVG(years_employed) FROM employees GROUP BY role;
hints: GROUP BY role 按角色分组，AVG(years_employed) 计算每组平均
SELECT role, AVG(years_employed) FROM employees GROUP BY role;
SELECT role, AVG(years_employed) FROM employees GROUP BY role;

basic.question_text: 查询**每栋建筑的员工总工龄**。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT building, SUM(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building;
accept_alternatives: SELECT building, SUM(years_employed) FROM employees GROUP BY building;
hints: SUM(years_employed) 求每组工龄总和
SELECT building, SUM(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building;
SELECT building, SUM(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building;

basic.question_text: 查询所有电影中**最短的片长**和**最长的片长**。
hints: MIN() 和 MAX() 可以同时使用
SELECT MIN(length_minutes), MAX(length_minutes) FROM movies;
SELECT MIN(length_minutes), MAX(length_minutes) FROM movies;

basic.question_text: 查询**每栋建筑的员工数量**（含 NULL building 的归为'未分配'）。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT COALESCE(building, '未分配') AS building, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY building;
hints: COALESCE(building, '未分配') 把 NULL 替换为'未分配'然后分组
SELECT COALESCE(building, '未分配'), COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY 1;
SELECT COALESCE(building, '未分配'), COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY 1;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**每栋建筑的员工数、平均工龄、最长工龄**。
intermediate.question_context: GROUP BY building, COUNT, AVG, MAX。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT building, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG(years_employed) AS avg_yrs, MAX(years_employed) AS max_yrs FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building;
hints: COUNT(*), AVG(years_employed), MAX(years_employed)
SELECT building, COUNT(*), ROUND(AVG(years_employed),1), MAX(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building;
SELECT building, COUNT(*), ROUND(AVG(years_employed),1), MAX(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**员工人数最多的角色**（只需显示角色和人数）。
intermediate.question_context: GROUP BY role + ORDER BY COUNT DESC + LIMIT 1。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT role, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM employees GROUP BY role ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1;
hints: ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1 取数量最多的
SELECT role, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY role ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT role, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY role ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

intermediate.question_text: 查询每位导演电影的**平均片长**和**电影数量**，按电影数量降序。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT director, COUNT(*), AVG(length_minutes) FROM movies GROUP BY director ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
hints: AVG(length_minutes) 计算平均片长
SELECT director, COUNT(*), AVG(length_minutes) FROM movies GROUP BY director ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
SELECT director, COUNT(*), AVG(length_minutes) FROM movies GROUP BY director ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**按年份分组，每年的电影数量**，按年份升序。
intermediate.question_context: GROUP BY year, COUNT(*), ORDER BY year。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT year, COUNT(*) AS movie_count FROM movies GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;
hints: GROUP BY year 每年一组
SELECT year, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;
SELECT year, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;

intermediate.question_text: 查询北美城市表中**每个国家的城市数量和总人口**。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS city_count, SUM(population) AS total_pop FROM north_american_cities GROUP BY country;
hints: COUNT(*), SUM(population)
SELECT country, COUNT(*), SUM(population) FROM north_american_cities GROUP BY country;
SELECT country, COUNT(*), SUM(population) FROM north_american_cities GROUP BY country;

challenge.question_text: 查询**每栋建筑的工龄标准差**（先用 AVG 算平均，再算每个员工与平均的差的平方和的平均的平方根）。提示：可以简化或用内置函数。
challenge.question_context: 在 SQLite 中没有 STDDEV 函数，用公式手动计算：SQRT(AVG((x-avg)²))。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT building, ROUND(AVG((years_employed - sub.avg) * (years_employed - sub.avg)), 2) AS var FROM employees, (SELECT AVG(years_employed) AS avg FROM employees) AS sub WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building;
hints: 用子查询计算总体平均，然后每行减平均求平方
AVG((years_employed - (SELECT AVG(years_employed) FROM employees)) * (years_employed - (SELECT AVG(years_employed) FROM employees)))
太难可跳过。先练习基本的 GROUP BY。

challenge.question_text: 查询**每年发行的电影的平均评分**，按平均评分降序排列。
challenge.question_context: JOIN movies 和 boxoffice，GROUP BY year，AVG(rating)，ORDER BY DESC。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT year, ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY year ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;
hints: JOIN + GROUP BY year + AVG(rating)
SELECT year, ROUND(AVG(rating),2) FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY year ORDER BY AVG(rating) DESC;
SELECT year, ROUND(AVG(rating),2) FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY year ORDER BY AVG(rating) DESC;
